text.title: clickup-setup Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for clickup-setup as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Automation: when status changes to "In Development" → set status to "In Progress". Then: when status changes to "In Progress" → set status to "In Development".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Circular automation loop. Task will switch states indefinitely until manually stopped.
